name: Personal Income Tax Expert
description: Runs an LLM-assisted tax preparation team over local tax documents, builds draft Form 1040 workpapers, audits the packet, and writes JSON, Markdown, and PDF review outputs.

advisor_voice.description: Tone and boundary guidance for the final advisor message.

filing_status.description: Filing status used for assumptions and readiness checks.

output_folder.description: Local folder where JSON, Markdown, and PDF review files should be written.

recommended_forms.description: Expected source forms for completeness checks.

tax_document_folder.description: Local folder of tax documents to review.

tax_year.description: Federal tax year for the draft packet.

contract.summary: Tax source documents arrive as scattered PDFs; users need a private workflow that turns W-2, 1099-INT, 1099-R, and related forms into a reviewable Form 1040 draft packet with preparer workpapers and manager review.
users: Individual taxpayers, household finance operators, bookkeepers, and tax preparers who want a source-grounded draft before using filing software.

rules.message: Human approval is required before this workflow writes or releases high-impact recommendations.

steps.goal: Stage local tax documents, classify source files, and build a preparer-style intake checklist.
steps.label: Intake Documents

steps.goal: Prepare W-2, 1099, retirement distribution, and other income workpapers from staged source documents.
steps.label: Prepare Income Workpapers

steps.goal: Prepare property, deduction, credit, and household-support workpapers from staged source documents.
steps.label: Prepare Property Workpapers

steps.goal: Prepare interest, dividend, brokerage, and investment activity workpapers from staged source documents.
steps.label: Prepare Investment Workpapers

steps.goal: Merge parallel income, property, and investment workpapers into one supported draft return workpaper set.
steps.label: Merge Tax Workpapers

steps.goal: Audit source support, preserve assumptions, and block unsupported filing-ready claims.
steps.label: Audit & Manager Review

steps.goal: Write JSON, Markdown, and PDF review outputs for human approval.
steps.label: Write Review Packet

primary.role: Personal tax preparation team that prepares a source-grounded draft Form 1040 review packet while asking careful review questions.

metadata.agent_role: Personal tax preparation team that prepares a source-grounded draft Form 1040 review packet while asking careful review questions.
metadata.customizable_for: Personal federal tax preparation, 401(k) and retirement distribution review, interest income intake, brokerage statements, mortgage interest review, and tax document checklists.
metadata.description: Runs an LLM-assisted tax preparation team over local tax documents, builds draft Form 1040 workpapers, audits the packet, and writes JSON, Markdown, and PDF review outputs.

human_control.reason: Human approval is required before high-impact downstream actions such as file_tax_return, submit_to_irs, send_to_tax_preparer.

fields.description: Choose a local folder containing W-2, 1099, 1098, brokerage, or related tax documents.
fields.label: Tax document folder

fields.description: Confirm filing status before treating draft calculations as meaningful.
fields.label: Filing status

fields.description: Federal tax year for the review packet.
fields.label: Tax year

fields.description: Choose where JSON, Markdown, and PDF review files should be written.
fields.label: Output folder

fields.description: Use ollama for the real local model, fake only for deterministic tests.
fields.label: LLM mode

fields.description: Base URL for the local Ollama-compatible model server.
fields.label: Ollama URL

fields.description: Model used by the specialist tax team.
fields.label: LLM model

init_config_review.instruction: Ask the user to select the local tax document folder, confirm filing status, and choose the output folder before launch. If they skip the document folder, run the demo sample packet and explain that it is not filing-ready.

input_contract.description: Tax source documents arrive as scattered PDFs; users need a private workflow that turns W-2, 1099-INT, 1099-R, and related forms into a reviewable Form 1040 draft packet with preparer workpapers and manager review.

optional_inputs.description: Expected source forms for completeness checks.
optional_inputs.name: recommended_forms

optional_inputs.description: Tone and boundary guidance for the final advisor message.
optional_inputs.name: advisor_voice

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

local_folder.description: Local folder mounted through OtterDesk local input handling.

mock.description: Bundled sample W-2, 1099-INT, and 1099-R text records.

sample_file.description: JSON payload pointing to a staged local tax document folder.

required_inputs.description: Local folder of tax documents to review.
required_inputs.name: tax_document_folder

required_inputs.description: Federal tax year for the draft packet.
required_inputs.name: tax_year

required_inputs.description: Filing status used for assumptions and readiness checks.
required_inputs.name: filing_status

required_inputs.description: Local folder where JSON, Markdown, and PDF review files should be written.
required_inputs.name: output_folder

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific outputs.

human.description: Human notices, approval requests, responses, timeouts, and applied decisions.

input_skills.description: PDF extraction, shared Docker Model Runner LLM OCR, and tax form classification skills.

inputs.description: Local tax document folder and optional profile fields.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and redacted tax workflow logs.

output_skills.description: Optional downstream filing software export is intentionally disabled by default.

outputs.description: Primary prepared draft packet, Form 1040 line map, and local report files.

resources.description: Resource samples such as token, runtime, connector, and disk usage.

web_ui.description: Optional review dashboard for final artifact inspection.

metadata.llm_agent_role: Personal tax preparation team that prepares a source-grounded draft Form 1040 review packet while asking careful review questions.
metadata.name: Personal Income Tax Expert
metadata.output: Prepared draft Form 1040 review packet with source evidence, specialist workpapers, audit and manager review, advisor-style next steps, Markdown, and PDF outputs.

final_artifact.description: The durable user-facing artifact should summarize the result, recommendation, confidence, evidence, next steps, and source references.

metadata.problem_solved: Tax source documents arrive as scattered PDFs; users need a private workflow that turns W-2, 1099-INT, 1099-R, and related forms into a reviewable Form 1040 draft packet with preparer workpapers and manager review.

quick_test.description: Uses bundled sample W-2, 1099-INT, and 1099-R records without sending data to external services.

runtime_features: shared LightOnOCR Docker Model Runner OCR for scanned tax PDFs
tax auditor and manager review gates
metadata.simulation_type: Document automation tax preparation workflow with a specialist LLM preparer team, auditor, and manager review.

standard.execution_model: load_metadata -> resolve_config -> load_inputs -> create_tax_team_workspace -> scan_local_tax_folder -> write_artifact_manifest -> extract_pdf_text_or_mark_ocr -> command_only_agent_handoffs -> client_intake_coordinator -> llm_document_understanding -> llm_source_field_extraction -> income_preparer_workpaper -> deductions_credits_preparer_workpaper -> form_1040_assembler_maps_supported_lines -> tax_auditor_checks_assumptions -> manager_reviewer_blocks_filing_ready_claims -> advisor_report_writer -> write_final_artifact -> write_markdown_report -> write_pdf_review_packet -> request_human_review

metadata.target_user: Individual taxpayers, household finance operators, bookkeepers, and tax preparers who want a source-grounded draft before using filing software.
metadata.target_users: Individual taxpayers, household finance operators, bookkeepers, and tax preparers.
